metadata.description: Performance optimization skills and Azure monitoring tools for GitHub Copilot CLI

plugins.name: perf-copilot
plugins.description: All performance optimization skills — exploring, investigating, and setup (Application Insights + Azure Monitor)

plugins.name: perf-explore
plugins.description: Explore application performance — find slow requests, anomalies, and optimization opportunities

plugins.name: perf-investigate
plugins.description: Investigate specific performance issues — drill into profiler traces, snapshots, and distributed operations

plugins.name: perf-setup
plugins.description: Enable and configure Azure monitoring tools (Profiler, Snapshot Debugger)
